---
title: "Climate & Ecosystems Group Projects and Products"
subtitle: "NOAA Fisheries - Southwest Fisheries Science Center - Ecosystem Sciences Division"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: projects
    contents: projects.yml
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "title"
    filter-ui: true
    image-height: 250px
    grid-item-border: true
    grid-item-align: center
    grid-columns: 3
---
